com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype

Class DataTypeFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype.DataTypeFactory

  • public class DataTypeFactory
extends java.lang.Object

    enlist data type to support X-UP or X-POP, and conduct transformation or comparison between data type.

    DataType is a class ro support various type data supported by X-UP or X-POP, and DataTypeFactory conduct transformation, comparison between data type using DataType.

    originally defined DataType are as below.

    Category Class Detail
    JAVA com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype.JavaDataType Define Java data type , transformation or comparison standard between data type
    SQL com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype.SqlDataType SQL data type definition
    PLATFORM com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype.PlatformDataType nexacro platform data type definition
    Author:
    dhrim
    See Also:
    DataType, JavaDataType, PlatformDataType, SqlDataType

      • getJavaDataType

        public static DataType getJavaDataType(DataType dataType)
        Return Java data type(DataType). If given DataType is not a type defined in JavaDataType, return compatible JavaDataType data type.
        Parameters:
        dataType - DataType
        Returns:
        DataType
